doc_title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and implementation of public open offer for treasury shares

key_facts.reason_jp: 事業ポートフォリオ戦略、資本構成最適化、資本効率向上、経営機動性強化

summary_en: Self-tender offer: 1,070,000 shares (10.97% of shares outstanding) from Honda Motor Co. at discounted market price (discount rate to be disclosed). Execution method: public open offer (ToSTNeT-3 ineligible due to low liquidity). Settlement date not yet specified. Honda retains ~15% ownership post-acquisition. Concurrent sale by Tanaka of 1,000,000 Honda shares to optimize capital structure.
summary_jp: 自己株式公開買付け：ホンダから1,070,000株（発行済株式10.97%）を市場価格から一定割引で取得。ホンダは約15%保有継続。取得後のホンダ保有株式1,526,000株のうち1,000,000株を立会外取引で売却予定。
tag_en: Self-tender offer - 1,070,000 shares (10.97% S/O) - Y18.7B - Honda retains ~15% stake
tag_jp: 自己株式公開買付け - 1,070,000株（10.97% S/O） - Y18.7B - ホンダが約15%保有継続

doc_title_en: Response to Realize Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Share Price

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営の実現

summary_en: Cost of capital and share price-conscious management initiative. Board resolution on current-state analysis and future policy direction and key measures. Detailed response framework in attachment.
summary_jp: 資本コストと株価を意識した経営実現に向けた対応。現状分析に基づき取締役会が今後の方針および主な取組みを決議。詳細は添付資料参照。
tag_en: Cost of Capital Initiative – Management Response – 7218 TANAKA SEIMITSU KOGYO
tag_jp: 資本コスト意識経営 – 対応方針 – 7218 田中精密工業
